mapper.select:
SELECT C.ROOM_ID AS roomId, C.PRODUCT_NO AS productNo, C.SELLER_EMAIL AS sellerEmail, C.BUYER_EMAIL AS buyerEmail, C.LAST_MESSAGE AS lastMessage, TO_CHAR(C.LAST_MESSAGE_AT, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI') AS lastMessageAt, C.MUTE_YN AS muteYn, P.PRODUCT_NAME AS productName, P.PRODUCT_PRICE AS productPrice, P.TRADE_STATUS AS tradeStatus, P.TRADE_METHOD AS tradeMethod, P.RESERVED_ROOM_ID AS reservedRoomId, (SELECT IMG_URL FROM PRODUCT_IMAGE PI WHERE PI.PRODUCT_NO = C.PRODUCT_NO AND PI.IS_MAIN = 'Y' AND ROWNUM = 1) AS productImgUrl, CASE WHEN C.SELLER_EMAIL = #{loginUserEmail} THEN C.BUYER_EMAIL ELSE C.SELLER_EMAIL END AS otherUserEmail,
(SELECT NICKNAME FROM MEMBER M WHERE M.EMAIL = ( CASE WHEN C.SELLER_EMAIL = #{loginUserEmail} THEN C.BUYER_EMAIL ELSE C.SELLER_EMAIL END )) AS nickname FROM CHAT_ROOM C JOIN PRODUCTS P ON C.PRODUCT_NO = P.PRODUCT_NO WHERE C.SELLER_EMAIL = #{loginUserEmail} OR C.BUYER_EMAIL = #{loginUserEmail} ORDER BY C.LAST_MESSAGE_AT DESC NULLS LAST

SELECT P.PRODUCT_PRICE AS productPrice, P.TRADE_STATUS AS tradeStatus, P.TRADE_METHOD AS tradeMethod, P.RESERVED_ROOM_ID AS reservedRoomId, (SELECT IMG_URL FROM PRODUCT_IMAGE PI WHERE PI.PRODUCT_NO = P.PRODUCT_NO AND PI.IS_MAIN = 'Y' AND ROWNUM = 1) AS productImgUrl, M.NICKNAME AS nickname FROM PRODUCTS P JOIN MEMBER M ON M.EMAIL = #{sellerEmail} WHERE P.PRODUCT_NO = #{productNo}
mapper.update: UPDATE PRODUCTS SET TRADE_STATUS = '판매중', RESERVED_ROOM_ID = NULL WHERE PRODUCT_NO = #{productNo}
